title: selaginella brigitteana
intro: Selaginella brigitteana, also known as the "spike moss" or "resurrection fern", is a type of small, green, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Selaginella brigitteana has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella brigitteana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
